name: Hirak Exchange Rates API
description: Hirak Exchange Rates API provides current and historical foreign exchange rates and cryptocurrency exchange rates. The API supports conversion between currencies and retrieval of available currency symbols. Note: This API may no longer be available as the original domain (rates.hirak.site) appears to be defunct.
